Title: CREATE SEQUENCE
Description: Define a new integer number sequence generator
See also: ALTER SEQUENCE , COMMENT ON SEQUENCE , NEXT VALUE FOR , DROP SEQUENCE .
Examples:
CREATE SEQUENCE [
schema_name
'.' ]
sequence_name
[ AS
datatype
]
    [ START WITH bigint# ]
    [ INCREMENT BY bigint# ]
    [ MINVALUE bigint# | NO MINVALUE ]
    [ MAXVALUE bigint# | NO MAXVALUE ]
    [ CACHE bigint# ]
    [ [ NO ] CYCLE ]
